title: <div>Receiving audio and visual content, properly labeling and organizing aforem
content:
Receiving audio and visual content, properly labeling and organizing aforementioned content, editing the material into a first draft, receiving feedback, implementing feedback, and continuing that cycle until optimal results are achieved.

My primary job is as a college educator. Your content is, above all, educational--and while the guests are heavy-hitting and entertaining, delivering information that pushes the boundaries and poses questions to further humankind is the purpose of your channel and aligns with my purposes as a person and educator.

I can help you make (more) awesome stuff by bringing my love of learning and obsession with technology, which drives me to continue developing my skillsets and knowledge base, to the table. Also, my ten years of experience as an academic and in the audio/visual realms may serve as some assistance! ^.^
